title: MineBombs
description: A simple mod that adds some throwable explosives that only hurt entities.
body:
A simple mod that adds some throwable explosives that only hurt entities (blocks do not get destroyed). meant for PvP and mobs alike.
Crafting recipes are super simple too, so you wont have a hard time getting them.
Currently there are only three types, but more will be added later on.

Known bugs:

Bombs deal no damage in peaceful.
